sessionStart.bash: set -eo pipefail; ROOT="${COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; [ -n "$ROOT" ] || { echo "[session-logger] COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT is empty, skip."; exit 0; }; SCRIPT="${HOOK_SCRIPT:-}"; [ -n "$SCRIPT" ] || { echo "[session-logger] HOOK_SCRIPT is empty, skip."; exit 0; }; TARGET="$ROOT/$SCRIPT"; [ -f "$TARGET" ] || { echo "[session-logger] target script not found: $TARGET"; exit 0; }; exec bash "$TARGET"
sessionStart.windows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { $pluginRoot = $env:COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($pluginRoot)) { Write-Output '[session-logger] COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT is empty, skip.'; exit 0 }; $runner = Join-Path $pluginRoot 'hooks\session-logger\run-hook.ps1'; if (-not (Test-Path $runner)) { Write-Output ('[session-logger] hook runner not found: ' + $runner); exit 0 }; & $runner -HookScript $env:HOOK_SCRIPT }"
